source_import_policy: The editable import hook named _de_time_editable was removed before pytest startup and the checkout src directory was inserted first on sys.path.

core_surface.denominator: Canonical core-plus-maintained detime surface; excludes CLI wrappers, I/O helpers, visualization helpers, deprecated tsdecomp compatibility, and optional/non-core integrations.

package_wide.denominator: Broader installable detime package, including CLI, I/O, visualization, wrappers, methods, schema helpers, serialization, profiling, and machine-facing helpers.
